inline_comments: Break-glass override: allow mutable identity matching (name/slug) in allowlists. Default behavior is ID-only matching.

Controls how channel messages are handled: - "open": channels bypass allowlists; mention-gating applies - "disabled": block all channel messages - "allowlist": only allow channels present in channels.slack.channels

Stream preview mode: - "off": disable live preview streaming - "partial": replace preview text with the latest partial output (default) - "block": append chunked preview updates - "progress": show progress status, then send final text Legacy boolean values are still accepted and auto-migrated.
Slack native text streaming toggle (`chat.startStream` / `chat.appendStream` / `chat.stopStream`). Used when `streaming` is `partial`. Default: true.
Optional per-chat-type reply threading overrides. Example: { direct: "all", group: "first", channel: "off" }.
Alias for dm.policy (prefer this so it inherits cleanly via base->account shallow merge). Legacy key: channels.slack.dm.policy.
Alias for dm.allowFrom (prefer this so it inherits cleanly via base->account shallow merge). Legacy key: channels.slack.dm.allowFrom.
Per-channel ack reaction override. Slack uses shortcodes (e.g., "eyes") rather than unicode emoji.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: api, business_logic, auth, logging
